name: Skill Converter Agent
description: Directory-first converter for transforming a generic skill into a Skill-Runner AutoSkill package.

prompts.gemini: Use skill `skill-converter-agent` to convert a source skill with dual-mode assessment. First resolve source type: directory path (`parameter.source_skill_path`) or zip package (`input.source_skill_package`). Evaluate auto suitability and interactive suitability independently, then derive classification and target execution_modes. Apply conversion in the target directory, run final validator `validate_converted_skill.py`, and always emit converted directory path, conversion report path, and converted zip path.
